title: carlina acanthifolia subsp. cynara
intro: Carlina acanthifolia subsp. cynara, also known as the Scythian thistle or globe artichoke, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing cholesterol levels, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Carlina acanthifolia subsp. cynara can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, allowing for convenient access to its medicinal and health benefits.
